_comment: Token guardrail (VISUAL-SPEC-CHECKLIST item 18.3 — 'cero numeros magicos'). Flags raw hex colors in CSS so new styles reach for the --gm-* design tokens instead of hardcoded values. color-no-hex is a WARNING (not an error) on purpose: app/globals.css legitimately DEFINES the --gm-* primitives with hex literals, so those warnings are EXPECTED there; the rule still surfaces new hex usage in any other CSS for review. Run with: npm run lint:css.
